title: The Mystery Room
description: You wake up in a strange room with no memory of how you got here. Find a way out.
opening_narration: You open your eyes. The room is dim, lit only by a faint phosphorescent glow from the walls. Stone, old wood, and silence. You have no memory of how you arrived here — but every instinct tells you to find a way out.
win_narration: A deep mechanical clunk reverberates through the walls as the lock disengages. The heavy door swings open with a groan, and pale grey light spills in from beyond. You step through without looking back. Whatever brought you to this place, it's behind you now.
